title: 48/64 FAIL: demonstrates a wrong 48L=H²-I² value
_fixture_purpose: Negative fixture (added 2026-07-06 to close a fixture-coverage gap -- this family previously had zero FAIL fixtures). Plants a deterministically detectable violation: direction (2,1) declares H_sq_minus_I_sq=49 instead of the correct H²-I²=7²-1²=48.
